title: link_layer: O(n) peer scan on every frame receive
description: In link_layer.rs:receive_frame(), every known peer is tried via O(n) signature verification scan (line 349-367). For a mesh with many neighbors, this becomes expensive - signature verification is cryptographically intensive (scalar multiplication). Consider: index peers by IID derived from source address field (if present in frame), or maintain a small LRU cache of recently-verified senders to check first.
close_reason: Known limitation documented in code. Requires frame format change to include sender IID. TODOs acknowledge this.
